**`utils/use-scraper-parts.ts:85`** — dep array uses `!!parseFileData` (boolean coercion). Second file upload silently keeps the FIRST file's parts because the memo doesn't recompute on reference change while truthy. 0.90 confidence.

**`scrape-success.modal.tsx:103-109`** — cycle default-seed effect re-fires on `selectedCycleId === undefined` → admin cannot clear-to-empty (always springs back to "Latest"). User explicitly wanted clear-to-empty to surface warning + block submit. 0.75 confidence.

**`utils/use-scraper-parts.ts:201-205`** — `resetParts` clears `selectedMinus` (refund picks) on new file upload. Refund is file-independent — likely a UX regression.
**`utils/use-scraper-submit.ts:326`** — vestigial `hasFileChanges` return; no consumer reads it.
**`steps/s2-map-and-review.tsx`** — `TransformEditorProps` carries `_excludedRows`/`_updateExcludedRows`/`_columnRenames`/`_setColumnRename` that S2 doesn't consume (row-exclusion UI disabled).
